caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
caller-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 is unsupported and may cause runtime incompatibilities or missing features.

caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
caller-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 17 APIs; keeping source/target at 11 would prevent usage of Java 17 features or cause build failures if the JDK is strictly enforced.
Spring Boot 3.x uses this property to determine the Java version for compilation and runtime checks; mismatching it with the parent version causes build errors.

caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
caller-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may not support Java 17 bytecode generation or annotation processing correctly, leading to compilation errors.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3 ecosystem.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 17 language features and bytecode version; keeping Java 11 settings would prevent usage of Java 17 APIs or cause mismatch with the Spring Boot 3 requirement.
Spring Boot and other build plugins often rely on the java.version property to configure compilation and runtime behavior; an incorrect value can lead to build failures or runtime incompatibilities.
Older Lombok versions may not fully support Java 17 or Spring Boot 3 annotations processing; upgrading ensures compatibility with the new JDK and framework versions.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 15 language features, which may fail to utilize Java 17 features or cause compatibility issues with dependencies requiring Java 17.
